notes: All 13 nodes recovered. Skill used pipeline/dataflow logic (produces/consumes edges) to derive relationships but GT only draws structural field-type edges (4: AssignedSession→CookingSession, RerollOptions→ScoredRecipe, LeftoverBank→LeftoverEntry, ShoppingList→ConsolidatedIngredient). Missed RerollOptions→ScoredRecipe and ShoppingList→ConsolidatedIngredient. 10/12 skill edges are pipeline dependencies with no GT structural basis. Root cause: classDiagram prompt must distinguish structural field-type edges from dataflow function-I/O edges. Prompt gap.

All 7 nodes and all 4 GT edges recovered. 3 hallucinated edges: MealAssignment→MealType and MealAssignment→DayOfWeek (enum associations not in GT — MealAssignment fields use raw int/str, not enum instances), MealPlanManager→AggregatedIngredient (only instantiated internally, never returned from public API). Hallucination driven by file-proximity inference and call-chain logic. Root cause: same classDiagram prompt gap — need rule against drawing edges from proximity alone, only from explicit field-type declarations.

Skill correctly identified all pipeline phases and DB interactions. Failed because GT captured every branch, loop control, and sub-step (72 nodes). Graph parser captures calls/produces/consumes but not intra-method CFG (branching, loop counters, conditional guards). Parser capability limit, not a prompt gap. GT may be over-detailed for flowchart — GT granularity calibration needed. Note: actual GT diagram has 73 nodes/92 edges vs stated 72/83 in GT notes (convergence edges undercounted); graded against stated counts.

DataVersions merged into Database participant (1 missed actor — at threshold). Both routes correctly reconstructed with alt branch, DB query pattern, and version hash query. Two GT self-call messages omitted (intra-handler JSON parsing not visible in graph edges). All skill messages have GT basis. cross_file_edges to db_factory were the key signal.

All 7 GT states recovered (ENQUEUED=Active, AVAILABLE=Queued, correct composite structure). 9/11 GT edges recovered — missed Served→Active re-entry and Active→[*] _cleanup_queue eviction (silent overflow with no history record). EXPIRED sub-state inserted as intermediate for cleanup path (not in GT, adds 1 hallucinated state + 1 edge). Hallucination_rate 0.20 just over 0.15 threshold. Single-file stateDiagram-v2 confirmed viable (vs multi-file which is unsupported) — near-pass shows the capability is real. Fix: add _cleanup_queue eviction to prompt rules; suppress EXPIRED elaboration.
